name: PT Tempo Scan Pacific Tbk
summary: PT Tempo Scan Pacific Tbk engages in the pharmaceuticals, personal care and cosmetics, and distribution services businesses in Indonesia and internationally. It operates through three segments: Pharmaceuticals, Consumer Products and Cosmetics, and Distribution Services. The company is involved in the construction and rental of buildings; provision of warehousing, freight forwarding, advertising and promotion, research and development, computer systems, and distribution and marketing services; medical devices trading; and manufacture of food supplements, food and beverages, and plastic packaging, as well as consumer products, soaps, and household products. It sells its products under Bodrex, Vidoran, Hemaviton, Oskadon, Bodrexin, Neo rheumacyl, Oskadryl, Contrexyn, Zevit Grow, Wybert, Vitonal, Polaris, and Vitamin IPI brands. The company was formerly known as PT Scanchemie. PT Tempo Scan Pacific Tbk was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Tempo Scan Pacific Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Bogamulia Nagadi.
